languages.text: "Ее нет и никогда не было, Лорд-капитан. Ни один из Адептус Механикус не даровал этому сервочерепу таинство личной авторизации, пусть Эоганн Фебрус и утверждает обратное. Для хранения информации и, тем более, имитации личностных характеристик, требуется гораздо более сложный {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитатор{/g} и органическая база. Здесь они отсутствуют. Модель 17-401 последние несколько десятков лет функционирует на базовых настройках".

traits.locale_text: "Ее нет и никогда не было, Лорд-капитан. К данному сервочерепу никто не прикасался со дня его сотворения, в том числе магос Эоганн Фебрус. Для хранения информации и, тем более, имитации личностных характеристик, требуется гораздо более сложный {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитатор{/g} и органическая база. Здесь они отсутствуют. Модель 17-401 последние несколько десятков лет функционирует на заводских настройках".

languages.text: "He does not have one and never has, Lord Captain. No member of the Adeptus Mechanicus has ever granted this servo-skull the sacred boon of personal authorisation, despite Eogunn Februs's claims to the contrary. To retain information, much less mimic personality characteristics, requires a far more sophisticated {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} and organic base. These are absent here. For the past several decades, this 17-401 model has been operating on basic settings."
languages.original_text: "Ее нет и никогда не было, Лорд-капитан. Ни один из Адептус Механикус не даровал этому сервочерепу таинство личной авторизации, пусть Эоганн Фебрус и утверждает обратное. Для хранения информации и, тем более, имитации личностных характеристик, требуется гораздо более сложный {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитатор{/g} и органическая база. Здесь они отсутствуют. Модель 17-401 последние несколько десятков лет функционирует на базовых настройках".

No member of the Adeptus Mechanicus has ever granted this servo-skull the sacred boon of personal authorisation, despite Eogunn Februs's claims to the contrary. To retain information, much less mimic personality characteristics, requires a far more sophisticated {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} and organic base. These are absent here. For the past several decades, this 17-401 model has been operating on basic settings."

"He does not have one and never has, Lord Captain. No member of the Adeptus Mechanicus has ever granted this servo-skull the sacred boon of personal authorisation, despite Eogunn Februs's claims to the contrary. To retain information, much less mimic personality characteristics, requires a far more sophisticated {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} and organic base. These are absent here. For the past several decades, this 17-401 model has been operating on basic settings."

"He does not have one and never has, Lord Captain. No member of the Adeptus Mechanicus has ever granted this servo-skull the sacred boon of personal authorisation, despite Eogunn Februs's claims to the contrary. To retain information, much less mimic personality characteristics, requires a far more sophisticated {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} and organic base. These are absent here. "He does not have one and never has, Lord Captain. No member of the Adeptus Mechanicus has ever granted this servo-skull the sacred boon of personal authorisation, despite Eogunn Februs's claims to the contrary. To retain information, much less mimic personality characteristics, requires a far more sophisticated {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} and organic base. These are absent here. For the past several decades, this 17-401 model has been operating on basic settings."

languages.text: «Ni la tiene ni la ha tenido nunca, Lord Capitán. Ningún miembro del Adeptus Mechanicus ha dotado a este servocráneo el don de la autorización personal, pese a que Eogunn Februs afirme lo contrario. Para conservar información, no digamos ya para imitar una personalidad, haría falta un {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitador{/g} mucho más sofisticado y una base orgánica. Ninguna de las dos cosas está presente. Durante las últimas décadas, esta unidad de modelo 17-401 ha funcionado con los ajustes básicos».
languages.original_text: "He does not have one and never has, Lord Captain. No member of the Adeptus Mechanicus has ever granted this servo-skull the sacred boon of personal authorisation, despite Eogunn Februs's claims to the contrary. To retain information, much less mimic personality characteristics, requires a far more sophisticated {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} and organic base. These are absent here. For the past several decades, this 17-401 model has been operating on basic settings."

traits.locale_text: «Ni la tiene ni la ha tenido nunca, Lord Capitán. Ningún miembro del Adeptus Mechanicus ha dotado a este servocráneo el don de la autorización personal, pese a que Eogunn Februs afirme lo contrario. Para conservar información, no digamos ya para imitar una personalidad, haría falta un {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitador{/g} mucho más sofisticado y una base orgánica. Ninguna de las dos cosas está presente. Durante las últimas décadas, esta unidad de modelo 17-401 ha funcionado con los ajustes básicos».

languages.text: “他没有此类模块，且从未装配过，舰长大人。机械修会的任何成员，都未曾将这神圣的个人授权赐予这个伺服头骨，尽管伊奥贡·费布鲁斯对此另有说法。若要存储信息，需要极其复杂的{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}沉思者{/g}和有机基础，更不用说模仿人格特征了。而上述组件并不存在。过去几十年来，该17-401型号伺服头骨一直在基础设置下运行。”
languages.original_text: "He does not have one and never has, Lord Captain. No member of the Adeptus Mechanicus has ever granted this servo-skull the sacred boon of personal authorisation, despite Eogunn Februs's claims to the contrary. To retain information, much less mimic personality characteristics, requires a far more sophisticated {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} and organic base. These are absent here. For the past several decades, this 17-401 model has been operating on basic settings."

traits.locale_text: “他没有此类模块，且从未装配过，舰长大人。机械修会的任何成员，都未曾将这神圣的个人授权赐予这个伺服头骨，尽管伊奥贡·费布鲁斯对此另有说法。若要存储信息，需要极其复杂的{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}沉思者{/g}和有机基础，更不用说模仿人格特征了。而上述组件并不存在。过去几十年来，该17-401型号伺服头骨一直在基础设置下运行。”

languages.text: « Il n'en a jamais eu, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Aucun membre de l'Adeptus Mechanicus n'a jamais octroyé à ce servocrâne la bénédiction d'une autorisation personnelle, quand bien même Eogunn Februs prétend le contraire. Pour imiter des caractéristiques de personnalité ou simplement retenir des informations, un {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitateur{/g} et une base organique bien plus sophistiqués sont nécessaires. Ce modèle 17-401 en est dépourvu et ses réglages d'origine n'ont jamais été modifiés au cours de ses dizaines d'années de service. »
languages.original_text: "He does not have one and never has, Lord Captain. No member of the Adeptus Mechanicus has ever granted this servo-skull the sacred boon of personal authorisation, despite Eogunn Februs's claims to the contrary. To retain information, much less mimic personality characteristics, requires a far more sophisticated {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} and organic base. These are absent here. For the past several decades, this 17-401 model has been operating on basic settings."

traits.locale_text: « Il n'en a jamais eu, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Aucun membre de l'Adeptus Mechanicus n'a jamais octroyé à ce servocrâne la bénédiction d'une autorisation personnelle, quand bien même Eogunn Februs prétend le contraire. Pour imiter des caractéristiques de personnalité ou simplement retenir des informations, un {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitateur{/g} et une base organique bien plus sophistiqués sont nécessaires. Ce modèle 17-401 en est dépourvu et ses réglages d'origine n'ont jamais été modifiés au cours de ses dizaines d'années de service. »

languages.text: "Hafızası yok, hiçbir zaman da olmadı Lord Kaptan. Eogunn Februs'un aksini iddia etmesine rağmen hiçbir Adeptus Mechanicus mensubu, bu hizmeleti kişisel yetkilendirme denen kutsal lütufla ödüllendirmemiştir. İrfanı muhafaza etmek, hele ki kişilik özelliklerini taklit etmek; çok daha gelişmiş bir {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}kavramsayar{/g} ve organik taban gerektirir. Bunlar burada yok. Geçtiğimiz birkaç on yılda bu 17-401 modeli, temel ayarlarında çalıştı."
languages.original_text: "He does not have one and never has, Lord Captain. No member of the Adeptus Mechanicus has ever granted this servo-skull the sacred boon of personal authorisation, despite Eogunn Februs's claims to the contrary. To retain information, much less mimic personality characteristics, requires a far more sophisticated {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} and organic base. These are absent here. For the past several decades, this 17-401 model has been operating on basic settings."

traits.locale_text: "Hafızası yok, hiçbir zaman da olmadı Lord Kaptan. Eogunn Februs'un aksini iddia etmesine rağmen hiçbir Adeptus Mechanicus mensubu, bu hizmeleti kişisel yetkilendirme denen kutsal lütufla ödüllendirmemiştir. İrfanı muhafaza etmek, hele ki kişilik özelliklerini taklit etmek; çok daha gelişmiş bir {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}kavramsayar{/g} ve organik taban gerektirir. Bunlar burada yok. Geçtiğimiz birkaç on yılda bu 17-401 modeli, temel ayarlarında çalıştı."

languages.text: "Er hat keine, und das war schon immer so, Lord Captain. Kein Mitglied des Adeptus Mechanicus hat diesem Servoschädel je die heilige Gabe persönlicher Autorisierung erteilt, auch wenn Eogunn Februs das Gegenteil behauptet. Das Speichern von Informationen und die Imitation persönlicher Eigenschaften erfordert einen weitaus komplexeren {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}Cogitator{/g} und eine organische Basis. Beides fehlt in diesem Fall. In den letzten Dekaden hat dieses 17-401-Modell mit seinen Grundeinstellungen operiert."
languages.original_text: "He does not have one and never has, Lord Captain. No member of the Adeptus Mechanicus has ever granted this servo-skull the sacred boon of personal authorisation, despite Eogunn Februs's claims to the contrary. To retain information, much less mimic personality characteristics, requires a far more sophisticated {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} and organic base. These are absent here. For the past several decades, this 17-401 model has been operating on basic settings."

traits.locale_text: "Er hat keine, und das war schon immer so, Lord Captain. Kein Mitglied des Adeptus Mechanicus hat diesem Servoschädel je die heilige Gabe persönlicher Autorisierung erteilt, auch wenn Eogunn Februs das Gegenteil behauptet. Das Speichern von Informationen und die Imitation persönlicher Eigenschaften erfordert einen weitaus komplexeren {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}Cogitator{/g} und eine organische Basis. Beides fehlt in diesem Fall. In den letzten Dekaden hat dieses 17-401-Modell mit seinen Grundeinstellungen operiert."

languages.text: 「彼はそれを持っていませんし、これまで持ったこともありません、ロード・キャプテン。エオガン・フェブラスがいかに主張しようとも、アデプトゥス・メカニクスの誰一人として、このサーヴォスカルに個別認証という神聖な恩寵を与えたことはないのです。情報を保持すること、ましてや人格的特徴を模倣することには、はるかに高度な{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}コギテーター{/g}と有機的基盤が必要です。ここにはそれが存在しません。ここ数十年、この17-401型は基本設定のまま稼働してきました。」
languages.original_text: "He does not have one and never has, Lord Captain. No member of the Adeptus Mechanicus has ever granted this servo-skull the sacred boon of personal authorisation, despite Eogunn Februs's claims to the contrary. To retain information, much less mimic personality characteristics, requires a far more sophisticated {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} and organic base. These are absent here. For the past several decades, this 17-401 model has been operating on basic settings."

traits.locale_text: 「彼はそれを持っていませんし、これまで持ったこともありません、ロード・キャプテン。エオガン・フェブラスがいかに主張しようとも、アデプトゥス・メカニクスの誰一人として、このサーヴォスカルに個別認証という神聖な恩寵を与えたことはないのです。情報を保持すること、ましてや人格的特徴を模倣することには、はるかに高度な{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}コギテーター{/g}と有機的基盤が必要です。ここにはそれが存在しません。ここ数十年、この17-401型は基本設定のまま稼働してきました。」
